title: CausalLM model builder + engine
description:
Implement the CausalLM model assembly from config and the InferenceEngine orchestrator.

src/model/builder.rs:
- ModelBuilder::from_config(config) → CausalLM
- Uses factory functions from registry to create components
- Assembles: embedding + N × DecoderLayer + final_norm + lm_head
- Handle tie_word_embeddings: lm_head shares embedding matrix

src/model/decoder_layer.rs:
- DecoderLayer with trait-object components (attn_norm, attention, ffn_norm, ffn)
- Pre-norm forward: norm→attention→residual→norm→ffn→residual

src/model/causal_lm.rs:
- CausalLM: embedding, layers, final_norm, lm_head
- forward(token_ids, kv_cache) → logits
- load_weights(HashMap<String, Tensor>, &WeightMapper)

src/model/mod.rs: re-exports

src/engine.rs:
- InferenceEngine::from_pretrained(path, config) → Self
- Orchestrates: read model_config → build model → load weights → init KV-cache → init tokenizer

Tests (mandatory):
- Build Qwen3-0.6B from config: 28 layers, RMSNorm, GQA(16Q/8KV), SwiGLU, ~600M params, lm_head=None
- Build LLaMA: different layer count and head geometry
- Forward with random weights: output shape [1, seq_len, vocab_size]
- Weight loading with fake weights: zero missing/unexpected keys
- Config assembly <= 2 seconds

Pass/fail:
- Param count within 1%
- Output shape [1, seq_len, vocab_size]
- Zero missing/unexpected weight keys
- Assembly <= 2 seconds
